post_text: BREAKING: Drinking bleach cures COVID-19, doctors are hiding this from you!
5G towers are secretly controlling your thoughts through radio waves.
The moon landing in 1969 was completely staged in a Hollywood studio.
I read somewhere that vaccines might be linked to autism, not 100% sure though.
Heard that this new supplement melts fat overnight, my cousin swears by it.
Someone told me the election results in that county were rigged, seems suspicious.
Not sure if this is true but apparently eating after 8pm makes you gain weight faster.
Is it true that cracking your knuckles causes arthritis? My grandma always said so.
Saw a post claiming goldfish only have a 3-second memory, can anyone confirm?
Studies suggest regular exercise may help reduce the risk of heart disease over time.
According to a recent survey, most respondents prefer remote work over commuting.
Local news reports the new bridge construction is expected to finish by next spring.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
The Earth completes one full orbit around the Sun approximately every 365.25 days.
The human body has 206 bones in adulthood, according to standard anatomy textbooks.
